title: Indirect questions
subtitle: Ask embedded questions naturally.
overview: Indirect questions are smoother and more polite.

sections.title: Pattern
rows: I do not know where it is.
I would like to know how much it costs.
Me pregunto si vale la pena.
I wonder if it is worth it.
Could you tell me when the train leaves?

items.es: No sé por qué cancelaron la reunión.
items.en: I do not know why they canceled the meeting.

items.es: Quisiera saber si hay habitaciones libres.
items.en: I would like to know if there are free rooms.

items.es: Me pregunto si esta solución funcionará a largo plazo.
items.en: I wonder if this solution will work in the long term.
Could you tell me where I have to wait?

items.es: No estoy seguro de cómo deberíamos responder.
items.en: I am not sure how we should respond.
